    "Splice located outside of a junction box",
    "Exposed current-carrying conductors"

  "actions": [
    "De-energize circuit immediately",
    "Install listed junction box with proper clamps and secure cover to enclose splice",

  "rationale": "NEC 110.14 requires all splices and terminations to be made within approved enclosures. A splice outside a box is non-compliant, exposes live conductors to damage and contact, and presents shock and fire hazards. As an in-service installation, this constitutes an immediate safety risk mandating a fail decision.",
